testcase.name: postcontactLogControllerv4

failure.message: expected [{"ContactLog":{"Success":true,"Data":{"ServiceOrderNumber":"SORD00000008993"},"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"ContactLog":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Contact log already exists for this Location, Customer, Action Code, Contact date and Contact time.","Level":3}]}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"ContactLog":{"Success":true,"Data":{"ServiceOrderNumber":"SORD00000008993"},"Messages":[]}}] but found testcase.name: putcontactLogv4

failure.message: expected [{"Check":{"Success":true,"Data":{"FileName":"C:\\Csm_sendtoapi\\\\APCHE0000.TXT"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Sent To AP updated","Level":1}]}}] but found [{"ContactLog":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"LocationId is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"CustomerId is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"ActionCode is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"FirstContactDateTime is required","Level":3}]}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Check":{"Success":true,"Data":{"FileName":"C:\\Csm_sendtoapi\\\\APCHE0000.TXT"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Sent To AP updated","Level":1}]}}] but found [{"ContactLog":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"LocationId is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"CustomerId is
